ASD: spacecraft telemetry data with one second sample rate.
CalIt2: sensor data collected from various environments with one second sample rate.
CICIDS: network traffic data with a one-second sample rate.
Creditcard: credit card transactions with one second sample rate.
Daphnet: accelerometer data from Parkinson's disease patients with a 50 Hz sample rate.
Exathlon: sensor data from wearable devices with one second sample rate..
GECCO: traffic flow data from various urban locations with five minutes sample rate.
Genesis: sensor data from an industrial plant with one minute sample rate.
MSL: sensor data from a manufacturing plant with one minute sample rate.
NYC: traffic flow data from New York City with one minute sample rate.
PSM: power system measurements from electrical grids with one second sample rate.
PUMP: pump performance data with one minute sample rate.
SKAB: sensor data from a smart building with one minute sample rate.
SMAP: soil moisture data from a satellite with one day or two days or three days sample rate.
SMD: sensor data from industrial machines with one second sample rate.
SWAN: sensor data from a water quality monitoring system with one hour sample rate.
SWAT: streamflow data from various watersheds with one day sample rate.
